title: MedMemory AI
description: AI-powered medical memory with timeline generation, RAG chat, report analysis, and health insights.
keyFeatures: Built MedMemory AI, a personal medical memory platform that converts reports into a structured health timeline
Implemented AI-powered chat over complete medical history using RAG, Qdrant, and local LLMs via Ollama
Developed an automated document ingestion pipeline with OCR, medical information extraction, and timeline generation
Integrated semantic search, structured medical records, and patient-specific retrieval for contextual responses
